summary: A well‑recorded concert with good sound quality that fans remember fondly for its nostalgic vibe and Pigpen’s “operator” organ playing.
review: Reviewers consistently praise this show, noting the solid recording quality and the emotional connection they feel to the performance – especially highlighting Pigpen’s organ work. While no specific songs are called out, the overall sentiment is that the concert captures the classic Dead atmosphere that fans cherish.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers give high marks (5, 5, 4) and focus on positive aspects of both the performance and recording; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer explicitly says the recording quality is good; no further technical details are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers emphasize overall nostalgic enjoyment rather than detailed set analysis.

band_member_comments.Keys: Pigpen’s organ (referred to as “operator”) is specifically praised.
